meaning: 梅肯[美国佐治亚州中部城市]
examples: Beaune, Chablis, Auxerre and Macon are here.
Aiken bacon was baking bacon. The bacon he was baking was bought in Macon.
They also settled in Macon, Ga., which Haskell explained, has a low cost of living.
Doctors in the suburbs of Boston have similar lifestyles as doctors in Peoria, Lubbock, and Macon.
And just in case, he's also courting the good-old-boy vote in places like Macon, Georgia.
